scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentic-board/shared && npm run build -w @agentic-board/ui && npm run build -w @agentic-board/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:cli && npm run typecheck -w @agentic-board/shared && npm run typecheck -w @agentic-board/ui && npm run typecheck -w @agentic-board/server
scripts.typecheck:cli: tsc --noEmit --strict --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop true --skipLibCheck true bin/cli.ts
